name: OpenFX
description: Instant cross-border payment infrastructure with 24x7 FX powered by stablecoin settlement.

seo.title: OpenFX — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: OpenFX: Instant cross-border payment infrastructure with 24x7 FX powered by stablecoin settlement.

when_to_use: 24/7 cross-border FX settlement via stablecoin rails
Instant international payouts bypassing correspondent banking
FX infrastructure for fintechs needing real-time global transfers

pros: Avoids SWIFT delays and correspondent fees
cons: Limited corridor coverage vs legacy networks
review.verdict: Solid pick if you need always-on FX settlement, but stablecoin exposure and narrow corridors limit reach.
review.best_for: Fintechs and treasuries needing 24/7 cross-border FX with crypto-rail efficiency
review.not_for: Consumer merchants or teams avoiding stablecoin regulatory exposure
